The largest '''moon''' of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Tifnyl]] had a thin [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] and primitive ecosystem. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] had placed a [[Listening post (Tifnyl)|listening post]] on the moon. A crew of ten [[Technician/Legends|technicians]] and ten [[Imperial Navy Trooper/Legends|Imperial Navy troopers]] manned the station, which was supplied by a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] once a month. The post's military value was negligible; it was established by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Villis Andal]] as a ploy to get additional credits sent to his sector from the public dole.
